since_last: 41% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.59%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +2.69% · Gold -0.39% · Nasdaq100 -0.38%. 41% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.59%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.59%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.19%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +15.56%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +15.56%, VRT +4.12%, MU +3.97%, DLR +3.89%, NXPI +3.64%. Laggards: SPCX -9.48%, AVAV -8.31%, ARM -6.78%, GOOGL -6.01%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -9.48% at $167.46
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -9.48% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
